---
title: "lookup_date_type"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `lookup_date_type()`

Lookup Date Type IDs

## Usage

```r
lookup_date_type(x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | Character vector. Date types (e.g., "week") or '"*"' for all. |

## Value

An integer vector of IDs.

## Description

Resolves date types (Day, Week, Month) to internal API IDs.
